headline: BROKER MEDICINES WITHOUT BREAKING THE RULES
subheading: Why negotiating medicine deals still demands MHRA registration, a quality system and full counterparty verification.
flux_prompt: Abstract clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking medicines brokering as an intermediary role in a regulated supply chain. Deep navy background washed with luminous teal and cyan gradients, a single subtle green accent thread. Two distinct glowing nodes on opposite sides connected by a precise flowing translucent conduit of light that passes between them without ever touching a central figure, symbolising negotiation and handover without ownership or physical possession. Faint geometric network lines, delicate verification checkmark motifs and shield-like protective forms float as soft bokeh, suggesting due diligence and a defence against falsified products. Frosted glass panels, fine grid traceability lines and crisp light reflections convey precision, oversight and trust. Premium minimal depth, soft volumetric haze, polished controlled atmosphere. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
